notableEvents.label: Gavin Sheets GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Manny Machado out at 2nd. Gavin Sheets out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: JJ Wetherholt GIDP
notableEvents.detail: JJ Wetherholt grounds into a double play, shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Ty France. Nathan Church out at 2nd. JJ Wetherholt out at 1st.
